nonclaims: This report does not draw universal sufficiency, necessity, minimality, FAR proof, shared-structure universality, or global superiority conclusions.

assumptions: Scenario JSON and vocabulary markdown are frozen source inputs.
Ambiguity policies match deterministic verifier registration.

derived_constructs.name: boolean_state_variable
derived_constructs.role: Represents proposition and rule activation truth values.

derived_constructs.name: ordered_append_only_history
derived_constructs.role: Represents transition order without removal or rewrite.

limitations: Equivalence is only to CRE-001 deterministic reference under registered ambiguity policies.
